title: Employees Earning More Than Their Managers

testcases.input: Employee table: +----+-------+--------+-----------+ | id | name | salary | managerId | +----+-------+--------+-----------+ | 1 | Joe | 70000 | 3 | | 2 | Henry | 80000 | 4 | | 3 | Sam | 60000 | Null | | 4 | Max | 90000 | Null | +----+-------+--------+-----------+ Output: +----------+ | Employee | +----------+ | Joe | +----------+ Explanation: Joe is the only employee who earns more than his manager.
testcases.expectedOutput: +----------+ | Employee | +----------+ | Joe | +----------+ Explanation: Joe is the only employee who earns more than his manager.
